title: Armor Durability Overlay [No Optifine]
description: Vanilla like armor durability overlay for 1.21.4+ without using optifine
body:
This is **the first** vanilla like **armor hud** for version **1.21.4+** ever (First ever also from me).

If you dont know what an armor hud is. It **shows** you how much **durability** your **armor** has left by showing them in different colors. It is really good in **Minecraft PVP**. For a while they were only available with **optifine** but I decided to not gatekeep the pack any further and release it. 

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/756a96d431d39371429b07e55352d900ae19d81b.png)
_It requires a mod called varients-cit. The pack is compatible with sodium_
